title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Jones Lang LaSalle

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Jones Lang LaSalle
jsonLd.description:
Jones Lang LaSalle, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jones Lang LaSalle:
Jones Lang LaSalle is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jones Lang LaSalle!
